title: The accounting system
summary: 9706 — double entry, books of prime entry, ledgers, and the accounting cycle.
learningObjectives: Identify books of prime entry and ledger accounts.
Outline the accounting cycle from source to statements.
Prepare basic journal and ledger entries.

simpleExplanation.title: Recording every transaction twice
simpleExplanation.summary: Double entry records each transaction with equal debit and credit — source documents flow through books of prime entry to ledgers and trial balance.
steps: Books of prime entry — day books.

sections.content: **Accounting system** (1.2.1) — master **DEAD CLIC** and **books of prime entry**.
